results.title: 'Focus is on how to win the trophy...': Vaibhav Sooryavanshi fires major warning at RCB, GT after 97 off 29 ball carnage
results.description: Though he fell just short of achieving the speediest century in the tournament archives, the fifteen year old successfully overhauled Chris Gayle’s historical benchmark for the most maximums hit within a single season.

results.title: Anees Bazmee gets nostalgic as Salman Khan-starrer ‘Ready’ clocks 15 years
results.description: Mumbai, May 28 (IANS) Filmmaker Anees Bazmee turned nostalgic on Wednesday evening, as his Salman Khan-starrer comedy entertainer ‘Ready’ completed 15 years since its release. [...]

results.title: 'Twisha Will Rest In Peace Only When...': Brother Hails HC Move Cancelling Giri Bala's Bail, Claims ‘VIP Nexus’ Used As Shield
results.description: The Madhya Pradesh HC quashed Giribala Singh's anticipatory bail in Twisha Sharma's death case, evoking strong reactions from her family and legal team, who saw it as a justice win. Justice Mishra criticized the lower court's evidence examination, highlighting injuries and calling for a thorough CBI investigation.

results.title: Telangana HC junks plea to join Salar Jung case
results.description: The court also relied on the Commissioners’ report dated October 13, 2025, which questioned the maintainability of the application.
